title: ranunculus macrorrhynchus subsp. trigonocarpus
intro: Ranunculus macrorrhynchus subsp. trigonocarpus is a subspecies of the Ranunculus macrorrhynchus plant, which is a type of buttercup in the Ranunculaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus macrorrhynchus subsp. trigonocarpus include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, this plant is often prepared in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
